calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection by Plaintiff's counsel. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Arbitration Order to Show Cause.
Appearances: No Appearance by Plaintiff Baheyya Zeidan
Ms. Sabrina Berdux, Esq. for Defendants Denise Aiello, et al.

Ms. Berdux, counsel for Defendants, advises the Court that this matter has settled. The Court orders this matter set on the Order to Show Cause re Dismissal Calendar pursuant to CRC 3.1385 for 8-14-2012 at 2:00 pm in Department 610.

Visiting Judge Wallace Douglas (Retired), Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (610)
